text_original: A state may be ruled by (measures of) correction;
text_normalized: A state may be ruled by (measures of) correction;

text_original: weapons of war may be used with crafty dexterity;
text_normalized: weapons of war may be used with crafty dexterity;

text_original: (but) the kingdom is made one's own (only) by freedom from action and purpose.
text_normalized: (but) the kingdom is made one's own (only) by freedom from action and purpose.

text_original: How do I know that it is so?
text_normalized: How do I know that it is so?

text_original: - In the kingdom the multiplication of prohibitive enactments increases the poverty of the people;
text_normalized: - In the kingdom the multiplication of prohibitive enactments increases the poverty of the people;

text_original: the more implements to add to their profit that the people have, the greater disorder is there in the state and clan;
text_normalized: the more implements to add to their profit that the people have, the greater disorder is there in the state and clan;

text_original: the more acts of crafty dexterity that men possess, the more do strange contrivances appear;
text_normalized: the more acts of crafty dexterity that men possess, the more do strange contrivances appear;

text_original: the more display there is of legislation, the more thieves and robbers there are.
text_normalized: the more display there is of legislation, the more thieves and robbers there are.

text_original: Therefore a sage has said, 'I will do nothing (of purpose), and the people will be transformed of themselves;
text_normalized: Therefore a sage has said, 'I will do nothing (of purpose), and the people will be transformed of themselves;

text_original: I will be fond of keeping still, and the people will of themselves become correct.
text_normalized: I will be fond of keeping still, and the people will of themselves become correct.

text_original: I will take no trouble about it, and the people will of themselves become rich;
text_normalized: I will take no trouble about it, and the people will of themselves become rich;

text_original: I will manifest no ambition, and the people will of themselves attain to the primitive simplicity.'
text_normalized: I will manifest no ambition, and the people will of themselves attain to the primitive simplicity.'
